project.title: Tasmanian Devil Facial Tumour Disease - Imiquimod treatment of DFT1 cells
project.projectDescription: A Tasmanian Devil Facial Tumour Disease (DFTD) tumor cell line was treated with the drug Imiquimod
project.sampleProcessingProtocol: Cell lysates were prepared and protein extracts were trypsin digested using standard methods. LC/MS performed using an Ultimate 3000 RSLC and LTQ-Orbitrap
project.dataProcessingProtocol: MaxQuant platform for LFQ proteomics and Perseus for statistical analysis

references.referenceLine: Patchett AL, Wilson R, Charlesworth JC, Corcoran LM, Papenfuss AT, Lyons BA, Woods GM, Tovar C. Transcriptome and proteome profiling reveals stress-induced expression signatures of imiquimod-treated Tasmanian devil facial tumor disease (DFTD) cells. Oncotarget. 2018 9(22):15895-15914

Comment[Instrument]: LTQ-Orbitrap mass spectrometer equipped with nanopray Flex ion source (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, USA)
Ultimate 3000 nano RSLC system (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, USA)
Comment[Separation]: Ultimate 3000 nano RSLC system (Thermo Fisher Scientific, Waltham, USA)
Comment[PrecursorMassTolerance]: mass error tolerances of 20 ppm then 4.5 ppm for initial and main peptide searches, respectively
Characteristics[CleavageAgent]: proteomics-grade trypsin from porcine pancreas (Sigma-Aldrich, St Louis, USA)
